## [00:00 - 01:03]

You want to get really excited? Try this before you go to sleep at night. Laying down at 9 o'clock? Dare you to do this. Make a list of people that if you contacted them they would change your life. And I'll bet you can't fall asleep, okay? What I want you to do is each night I want you to make a list of contacts, people that would change your life if you could hook up with them. Maybe you're starting a new business or you've got a product or a service or you've got a company or you're getting out of college or whatever the deal is, okay? Make a list of people that if you could get in touch with them they would change your life forever. I'm not worried. Don't worry about whether you're gonna contact them or how you're gonna contact them. Who would those five people do? Write that list down every night and watch what happens to you. There's something magical, okay? I did this one night. I'm literally, I started having dreams about these people. It literally worked me for the next eight hours of sleep, okay? Make a list of people that if you could make contact with them, touch them, email them, get in front of them, go to their office. If you could just get in front of these people they would change your life.
